Removes Adobe Flash as a requirement for effective UI modification.

Neiva is an standalone follower with custom voice lines.

Raised and mentored by her adoptive father, Urag in the WinterHold library as his apprentice.

Eager to discover her mysterious past, Neiva dropped out of school and made her way as a prisoner of her past.

She's ready to venture out with you. Perhaps together you can uncover her

State.Author: Reath

In the aftermath of the Civil War, the Aldmeri Dominion is stirring. 

There are rumors of Dominion soldiers close to the border of Cyrodiil and increased numbers of Thalmor agents in the Imperial City. 

Are you prepared to defend Skyrim once more or are you drawn to the power and promise of the Dominion?

This grants stalking minions and seven intense single duels as the assassins chase the player across the land. It is meant to give an open ended background storyline, along with the feeling of being hunted.

In return he will keep you company, cook you warm meals and brew powerful potions.

Now stranded in Skyrim, she carries on her holy mission to deliver justice in the name of the Light, wherever it may take her.
